type.description: The type of the message. Always set to `message`.

id.description: The unique ID of the message.

status.description: The status of item. One of `in_progress`, `completed`, or `incomplete`. Populated when items are returned via API.

role.description: The role of the message. One of `unknown`, `user`, `assistant`, `system`, `critic`, `discriminator`, `developer`, or `tool`.

items.description: A content part that makes up an input or output item.

phase.description: Labels an `assistant` message as intermediate commentary (`commentary`) or the final answer (`final_answer`). For models like `gpt-5.3-codex` and beyond, when sending follow-up requests, preserve and resend phase on all assistant messages. Omitting it can degrade performance. Not used for user messages.

title: Message
description: A message to or from the model.
